name: Buddy Review Source Selector
description: Selects an unreviewed Buddy run for background memory review and claims the review record for the current graph run.

inputSchema.name: Mode
inputSchema.description: Selection mode: auto_unreviewed scans completed Buddy runs; explicit uses source_run_id.

inputSchema.name: Source Run ID
inputSchema.description: Optional explicit source run id when mode is explicit.

outputSchema.name: Status
outputSchema.description: Selection status, usually succeeded or failed.

outputSchema.name: Has Source Run
outputSchema.description: Whether a reviewable source run was selected.

outputSchema.name: Selected Source Run ID
outputSchema.description: The selected source Buddy run id, or empty when no candidate exists.

outputSchema.name: Review ID
outputSchema.description: The background review record id claimed for this graph run.

outputSchema.name: Selection Report
outputSchema.description: Auditable details about candidate filtering and review claim creation.

zh-CN.name: Buddy 复盘来源选择器
zh-CN.description: 为后台记忆复盘选择尚未复盘的 Buddy 运行，并把复盘记录声明到当前图运行。

en-US.name: Buddy Review Source Selector
en-US.description: Selects an unreviewed Buddy run for background memory review and claims the review record for the current graph run.
